name: Dill Pickle Soup - Pc
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the vegetables and soup bone, clean, prepare stock, and drain off.
2. Shred the dill pickles into fine strips.
3. Garnish the soup with flour and cream, then bring to a boil.
4. Add uncooked dill pickles and pickle juice, salt to taste.
5. Heat until cooked (the shredded pickles may also be added when cooked).
6. Serve with potatoes, dropped noodles, or cooked farina cooled and cut into cubes.
